proposed_relations.description: project_first-second-ave-sbs represents the planning and design phase (2009–2011) of the M15 SBS project on First and Second Avenues, while project_m15-sbs-first-second-aves represents the same project as implemented (launched October 10, 2010). Both describe SBS on the M15 route along First and Second Avenues in Manhattan.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On October 10, 2010, MTA New York City Transit (NYCT) and New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) implemented the M15 Select Bus Service (SBS) along this route.

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id project_m15-sbs-first-second-aves matches its own registry record exactly — the observation already resolves to that id. Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new'. A planning_predecessor relation is proposed to project_first-second-ave-sbs, which represents the planning phase of the same real-world M15 SBS project on First and Second Avenues.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On October 10, 2010, MTA New York City Transit (NYCT) and New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) implemented the M15 Select Bus Service (SBS) along this route.
